title: Horwitz Law, Horwitz & Associates ransomware incident

extortion.description: Horwitz Law, Horwitz & Associates was hacked. All data was downloaded from they Network. There is a lot private and sensitive information, like a clients DOB, SSN, Personal data, Medical records, law cases. Law cases about drug addicts, home abuse, car accidents and many others. If you are a client of that firm - we are glad to inform you, what from now - your personal data is unsafe and can be public or sold out on dark market. We have all info about all clients, workers and partners of that firm, this is a few proofs:
